author: lOrm
content: SKIP — retry classifier is the `matches!(status, 429 | 503 | 529)` arm at `src/pipeline.rs:384`. Extending to 408/409 requires editing that match; ECONNRESET/EPIPE detection requires handling `reqwest::Error` from the `req.send().await` at `src/pipeline.rs:378-381`, which would convert the current `?`-propagation into a retryable arm — also in `src/pipeline.rs`. `src/pipeline.rs` is FORBIDDEN in this batch. Deferred.
